vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của địa vị xã hội
vocab.example: For many high-fliers, a luxury timepiece serves as a potent status symbol that signals success without saying a word.
Some individuals engage in conspicuous consumption, buying high-end watches primarily to flaunt their wealth to others.

vocab.meaning: tăng giá trị theo thời gian
vocab.example: Collectors often opt for rare models because they are likely to appreciate in value, making them a savvy financial investment.
Luxury mechanical watches are admired for their impeccable precision, achieved through centuries of engineering refinement.

vocab.meaning: toát lên vẻ/khí chất gì đó
vocab.example: A classic Swiss watch can help a professional exude an air of competence and attention to detail during business meetings.

vocab.meaning: các bộ phận máy móc bên trong phức tạp
vocab.example: Watch aficionados are often willing to pay a premium for the intricate internal mechanisms that power a manual-wind watch.
Owning a handcrafted watch is a testament to one's appreciation for fine artistry and traditional manufacturing.
People invest in expensive brands because they offer long-lasting durability that cheaper alternatives simply cannot match.

vocab.meaning: món đồ mua để khẳng định mục tiêu/khát vọng
vocab.example: For a young entrepreneur, their first luxury watch is often an aspirational purchase marking their entry into a new life stage.
Limited edition pieces provide a sense of exclusivity that appeals to those who want to stand out from the crowd.
